# Ophis Explorer

> Ophis Explorer is the public blockchain explorer for Ophis, an intent-based DEX aggregator (a CoW Protocol fork) live on Optimism mainnet. It surfaces orders, trades, settlement batches, and solver competition for Ophis.

## What you can look up

- Orders and their status (open, filled, expired, cancelled).
- Trades and the on-chain settlement transaction that filled them.
- Per-address activity: the orders and trades for a given wallet.
- Solver competition: which solver won a batch and the price it returned.

## Key facts

- Ophis settles on Optimism mainnet (chain 10) via its own GPv2Settlement at 0x310784c7FCE12d578dA6f53460777bAc9718B859, bytecode-identical to CoW's audited contract but deployed at a non-canonical address (not CoW's canonical 0x9008D19f58AAbD9eD0D60971565AA8510560ab41).
- Orders are gasless, off-chain, EIP-712-signed intents with a hard limit price; they can never settle below the signed limit.
- Flat 0.10% (10 bps) protocol fee on trade volume, applied to every trade.
- Non-custodial: every order is signed by the user's own wallet.

## Links

- [Swap](https://swap.ophis.fi/): the Ophis trading app.
- [Docs](https://docs.ophis.fi/): protocol design, Intent API reference, SDK, security audits.
- [Landing](https://ophis.fi/): product overview and the natural-language intent input.
- [Source](https://github.com/ophis-fi/ophis): full source code.
